name: codex-flows-monorepo
description: Codex app-server clients, turn automation, workspace backend tools, and repo-native workspace operations.

scripts.build: vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flows build && vp run --filter codex-workspace-backend-local build && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flow-docs build
scripts.check:types: vp run --concurrency-limit 1 --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flows --filter codex-workspace-backend-local --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flow-docs check:types && vp run -w docs:check
scripts.test: vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flows test && vp run --filter codex-workspace-backend-local test
